name: InfScroll

values.name: toLoaded
values.comment:
GotItems items ->
        ( { model
            | items =
                List.sort (model.items ++ items)
            , infScroll =
                if List.isEmpty items then
                    InfScroll.toStop model.infScroll

                else
                    InfScroll.toLoaded model.infScroll
            }
        , Cmd.none
        )

values.name: view
values.comment:
InfScroll.view model.infScroll
        (InfScroll.defaultContainerAttrs infScroll)
        (InfScroll.defaultItemsAttrs infScroll)
        (List.map viewItem model.items)
values.type: InfScroll.InfScroll -> List.List (Html.Attribute msg) -> List.List (Html.Attribute msg) -> List.List (Html.Html msg) -> Html.Html msg

values.name: whenLoadMore
values.comment:
MapInfScroll subMsg ->
        let
            (newInfScroll, cmd) =
                InfScroll.update subMsg model.infScroll
                    |> InfScroll.whenLoadMore MapInfScroll getItems
        in
        ( { model | infScroll = newInfScroll }
        , cmd
        )
values.type: (InfScroll.Msg -> msg) -> Platform.Cmd.Cmd msg -> ( InfScroll.InfScroll, Platform.Cmd.Cmd InfScroll.Msg ) -> ( InfScroll.InfScroll, Platform.Cmd.Cmd msg )
